info.english_meaning: to protectto watchto take care of

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saMrakzAmi vilumpAmi dadAmyahamaTAdade' (BA॰SAM॰224.43) saMrakzAmi=samyag rakzAmi vilumpAmi=viSezeRa Cinadmi
'BagavaYCrotumicCAvo yasmin kAle niSAcarO saMrakzaRIyO tO brUhi nAtivarteta tatkzaRam' (rA॰1.30.2).. saMrakzaraRIyO yajYasaMrakzaRAya nivAraRIyO
'A mA mitrAvaruReha rakzatam' (f0 7501) A samantAd rakzataM gopAyatam
'tasya dvArARi sarvARi paryAptAni bfhanti ca… yantrErArakzitAni ca' (BA0 ASrama0 517)
'AviSyemAM DaraRIM ye'Byarakzan purAtanIM tasya devasya sfzwim' (BA0 anu0 1878) uktacara evArTaH
'agneranIkamapa AviveSApAMnapAt pratirakzannasuryam' (vA0 saM0 824) asUryamasurasya mAyAdikaM pratirakzan nivartayan AtmAnaM rakzanniti tu SabdArTaH
'jiGatsuBya imaM me parirakzata' (aTarva0 8220) parirakzata parito rakzata
'na hyeza rAGavasyArTe jIvitaM parirakzati' (rA0 6427) na jIvitaM parirakzati prARavyayaM na gaRayati jIvitaSezaM nAdriyate
sajjanaM tUparakzaRam ityamaraH sEnyasya praguRIkaraRaM gulmako veti svAmI sEnyarakzaRAya praharikAdernyAsa uparakzaRamiti BAnujiH

prayoga.literature_text: sa kimarTaM naravaro na mAM rakzati rAGavaH
AtmAnaM mAM ca deveSa sarvadA rakza
